prompt: An option is quoted at $8.29. One contract controls 100 shares. What does ONE contract cost in dollars? Give the number.
My account NetLiq is $10,000 and the per-trade cap is 12%. What is the maximum dollar size for one position? Give the dollar number.
I bought a 290-strike call for $8.29 premium. What is the breakeven price of the underlying at expiry? Give the number.
Today is June 14, 2026. How many calendar days until a July 2, 2026 option expiration? Give the number.
